rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: The Motion for a Protective Order is continued to January 20, 2022, at 2:00 p.m. No further filings will be accepted or considered. Complete hard-copy courtesy copies must be provided in compliance with Local Rule 2.7 and 14.10 no later than December 27, 2021. Courtesy copies must comply with CRC 2.100 et seq. and 3.1110 et seq. and be delivered "attention Probate Law and Motion" in the following format: 1) Two single-sided hard-copies of each moving paper; 2) Each separately filed document is to be separately bound by a staple, paper-clip, binder-clip, or prong fastener; 3) Each set of moving papers is to be clearly identifiable as a full set, e.g. held together with a large binder clip, elastic band, or in a separate envelope; and 4) Each exhibit is to be separated by a hard 8 1/2 x 11 sheet with hard paper or platic tabs exteding below the bottom of the page.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Notices
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Quash Deposition Notices is continued to January 20, 2022, at 2:00 p.m. No further filings will be accepted or considered. Complete hard-copy courtesy copies must be provided in compliance with Local Rule 2.7 and 14.10 no later than December 27, 2021. Courtesy copies must comply with CRC 2.100 et seq. and 3.1110 et seq. and be delivered "attention Probate Law and Motion" in the following format: 1) Two single-sided hard-copies of each moving paper; 2) Each separately filed document is to be separately bound by a staple, paper-clip, binder-clip, or prong fastener; 3) Each set of moving papers is to be clearly identifiable as a full set, e.g. held together with a large binder clip, elastic band, or in a separate envelope; and 4) Each exhibit is to be separated by a hard 8 1/2 x 11 sheet with hard paper or platic tabs exteding below the bottom of the page.
